reviews.comment: Went to this new coffee shop in Amanora mall. The person who took the order greeted us to a warm welcome. Told him clearly I need a strong, bitter and hot coffee. Any suggestions from his special coffee. He suggested Spanish Bombon. No issues with spending Rs 326 for a nice cup of coffee. But what came to my table was a 30ml coffee shot- half of which was foam. The rest (15ml- no exaggeration here) was a cold sugary syrup. They call it coffee here. This has to be the worst ever coffee I have drank in my entire life. Disgusting coffee and pathetic place to drink coffee if you are a coffee lover. Do not spend your hard earned money here. Extremely overpriced and poor quality coffee. I can see a similar review for the same coffee in the google reviews. I hope the owner is listening….

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We truly value you taking the time to express your experience, and we understand how disappointing this must have felt. We’ve taken note of your comments and have already initiated an internal review with our team to address the concerns around the Spanish Bombon. Our goal is to ensure every cup meets both our quality standards and your expectations.We’d appreciate the chance to connect directly and learn more about your experience, please reach out to us via DM on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to hello@coffeeisland.in.Your feedback helps us do better, and we genuinely appreciate it.

reviews.comment: I recently visited this coffee shop. The service and seating arrangement were good, and they offer a variety of coffee and cold coffee options. However, I found the taste and authenticity quite disappointing the coffee was just average. Considering the price, it didn’t feel worth it overall.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We truly value your feedback on both the service and the coffee. reviews.comment: Wasn’t sure what to expect from an orange-flavored coffee, but Azhar at Coffee Island convinced me to give it a shot — and man, that was worth it! 🍊 The citrus twist hits first, then the coffee kicks in smooth and strong. It’s different, refreshing, and honestly kind of addictive. Great job, Azhar!

reviews.comment: Great coffee, great food, and great people. Yuvaraj was so fast and helpful, even though there was a huge line. Really appreciate the service here. The Korean pop is a must try. This place is definitely worth a visit!

reviewReply.comment: Five stars and a whole lot of love, grateful for your support!
Five stars and a whole lot of love, grateful for your support!

reviews.comment:
Visited this newly built cafe in Amanora. Great decor and atmosphere.
However did not like their coffee collection.
Unreasonable pricing of a small shot of coffee. Its called Spanish Bombon made with a spoon of condensed milk,  half a expresso shot and milk foam. It comes in a really small cup. It is like a shot. The price is 310 for this. We wanted to order Chai as well but it is made out of tea bag so why even keep it in the menu if you cant make the tea. The coffee is not available in all sizes. So disappointed with that as well.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Sukriti,
We appreciate your thoughts on your recent visit. The Spanish Bombón is indeed served as a condensed short coffee experience, and we understand it may not have matched your expectations. Your feedback on tea and menu sizing has been noted, and we’re looking into it. We’re glad you liked the atmosphere and hope you’ll visit us again to explore other beverages we offer.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/10866130483095140789/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaaGJVRlBhMlIyUlhKRVVrNVRUMEUzWDJ0elpFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Loved the place!!!!! They provide a free pour over experience. People who really don't know their coffee and all the mind overwhelming information about grinds and roasts must visit.

Siddhi(hope I spelled the name right) the person who demonstrated the pour over really was a lovely person and genuinely excited to get us through the short but immensely interesting experience as to how pour over works and makes the coffee different to drink.

By far the smoothest coffee I have ever tried and thinking of buying it soon and experiment on my own with the coffee beans as she suggested. She knew a lot of coffee fun facts which was endearing.

Please visit if you feel you don't know about coffee and also visit if you are looking to sit in a cozy place with cozy chair with your friends/partner.

reviewReply.comment: We’re delighted you enjoyed the pour-over experience and the cozy vibe. It’s always wonderful when guests get to discover coffee in a new way. Looking forward to welcoming you back for more brews and good times!

reviews.comment: Probably the first and the last time visiting the place. Delayed service and encountered frustrated customer asking for refund. Ordered a Chipotle rice bowl and was disappointed with the portion and with what was served for the price paid. Stop advertising something that your don't serve, it felt like rajma chawal with chicken and chutney

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. We hope you’ll consider giving us another try. We’d love the chance to make it right and offer you the experience Coffee Island is known for.
Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.
